mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO asset_transaction ( asset_id, tx_date, quantity, price, exchange_rate ) VALUES
(#{tx.assetId}, #{tx.txDate}, #{tx.quantity}, #{tx.price}, #{tx.exchangeRate})
mapper.select: SELECT tx_id AS id, asset_id, tx_date, quantity, price, exchange_rate FROM asset_transaction WHERE asset_id = #{assetId}
